headline: A clear process from inquiry to firing.
description: We keep planning simple while tailoring details to your group.

steps.title: Share your event brief
steps.description: Tell us your date range, group size, and desired atmosphere.

steps.title: Review your custom format
steps.description: We send a focused proposal with schedule, inclusions, and pricing.

steps.title: Enjoy the studio experience
steps.description: You host while we guide, then finish and fire all selected pieces.
